nasb.text: “And behold, I am coming quickly. Blessed is he who heeds the words of the prophecy of this book.”

esv.text: “And behold,     I am coming soon.     Blessed is the one who keeps the words of the prophecy of this book.”

cnv.text: “看哪！我必快來！那遵守這書上預言的人是有福的！”

ccb.text: “看啊，我快要来了。遵行这书中预言的人有福了！”

csbs.text: “看哪，我快要来了！那遵守这书上预言之话的人，他是蒙福的！”
